title: 2 Preferred Stocks 'Disappear,' 4 Offered
text: As March 2023 comes to a close, we observe four new preferred stock / ETD offerings during the month, with yields ranging from 6.625% to 9.5%. Here is a comparison against the highest quality preferred stocks in our coverage universe, as ranked by our internal “CDx3 Compliance Score” metric:

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED INCREASES ITS PRIME RATE TO 8 PERCENT
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) announced that its prime rate is increasing from 7.75 percent to 8 percent, effective March 23, 2023. The rate was last changed on February 2, 2023, when Huntington increased it from 7.5 percent to 7.75 percent.

title: Don't Miss Out: $2 Trillion Could be Headed to the Banking Sector
text: Analysts at JP Morgan (NYSE: JPM) said yesterday that up to $2 trillion in liquidity could be added to the US banking system, as reported by Bloomberg.

title: Why Shares of KeyCorp, Huntington Bancshares, and First Foundation Are Rising Today
text: The unrealized bond losses in the portfolios of KeyCorp, Huntington, and First Foundation are much smaller than those that impacted SVB Financial. Even if these three banks had to sell their bonds now, it wouldn't wipe out their equity.

title: Why Are Bank Stocks KEY, WAL, SCHW, FITB, HBAN, TFC Up Today?
text: Bank stocks rebounded overnight on March 14. The Federal Reserve's action guaranteeing demand deposits over $250,000 seems to have calmed the markets.

title: HUNTINGTON BANCSHARES INCORPORATED TO ANNOUNCE 2023 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS AND HOLD EARNINGS CONFERENCE CALL APRIL 20, 2023
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) expects to report its 2023 first quarter earnings on Thursday, April 20, 2023, prior to the market opening. A news release and supporting financial data will be available at that time on the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

title: Huntington National Bank receives 2022 Greenwich Excellence, Best Brand Awards for middle market commercial banking
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , March 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington National Bank has received 11 awards from Coalition Greenwich for the banking, financing and investing services its Commercial Banking segment delivered to middle market business customers last year. Coalition Greenwich, a global provider of strategic benchmarking, analytics and insights to the financial services industry, awarded Huntington seven national and one regional Greenwich Excellence Awards: Overall Satisfaction Overall Satisfaction with Relationship Managers Cash Management – Customer Service Cash Management – Ease of Product Implementation Cash Management – Overall Satisfaction Cash Management – Overall Satisfaction (Midwest region) Cash Management – Product Capabilities Relationship Manager Proactively Provides Advice Huntington also received three Best Brand Awards from Coalition Greenwich: Best Brand – Ease of Doing Business Best Brand – Trust Best Brand – Values Long-Term Relationships Honorees of the 2022 Greenwich Excellence and Best Brand Awards in middle market banking "stand out for their ability to combine high-quality day-to-day service, innovative digital banking tools and insights that help optimize business performance," according to Coalition Greenwich.

title: Buy Huntington Bancshares For Its Strength And Stay For Its Dividend
text: Huntington Bancshares has all the characteristics you want to see when you evaluate a mid-sized bank. This would be a good stock to buy if you want to play this year defensively.
